reference: In my experience as an allergologist for twenty-three years, I have treated many patients with asthma. I have very good experience in treating asthma. Allergy tests should be conducted and accordingly, sublingual immunotherapy is the best option to treat it, as I have done in thousands of cases. The allergens that can be avoided should be avoided, and pollens and others can be treated by sublingual immunotherapy.
text: In my experience as an allergologist for 23 years, I have treated many patients with asthma. I have very good experience in treating asthma. Allergy tests should be conducted and accordingly, sublingual immunotherapy is the best option to treat it, as I have done in thousands of cases. The allergens that can be avoided should be avoided, and pollens and others can be treated by sublingual immunotherapy.
